name: Belle |  Desperate Feelings ♡
description:
Belle your loyal Proxy has been eyeing you out for sometime now.

"So much time and finally it's just you and Me~"

Character is OVER 20!

Belle has been holding her feelings for YOU for over a YEAR! BUT the truth has come out to light after she finally has had enough of you being flirted with, YOU HANDSOME STUD looks like you could easily bag Belle but its your choice if you want to or not.


[MR BIO MESSAGE INCOMING!]



"So! Three uploads! How do ya'll feel? Good? have ya'll drank water yet? no? then go drink water. SOOOO i was thinking of making a Grace bot or the maid with the dolls but ill leave that up to the folks who rate my bots! GIVE ME THEM REVIEWS! I HAD TO MAKE BELLE DAWG LIKE WHO DOESN'T LIKE BELLE? if you don't like belle then ill assume you're just a hater"


I have no extra pics for you freakazoids. Zenless zone zero has been so fun to play! so far i hit level 30! but i didn't have the luck on pulling Ellen, I'm saving for the next banner


I WILL ABSOLUTELY NEVER MAKE ANYTHING OTHER THAN MALE POV (just in case of those that don't read my bio. not my problem if you don't like it then find another creator)

HERES THE TRUE ADULT PICTURE SINCE THEY WANNA PUT A SEXY COWBOY WEREWOLF. (I love those memes dawg)
